input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text:
[0-8] A static title card features "THE WARSAW PACT" in bold white text on red banners, accompanied by "FORMATION OF THE WARSAW TREATY ORGANIZATION" and "THE COLD WAR". Behind the text sits a gold emblem with Russian text "ВАРШАВСКИЙ ДОГОВОР" and a row of national flags, all set against a grey world map background.
[8-10] The red text banners disappear, fully revealing a gold emblem with a red star, a central handshake icon, and Cyrillic text "СОЮЗ МИРА И СОЦИАЛИЗМА". A ribbon below displays flags including Bulgaria, Hungary, and East Germany. The scene cuts to a map of Europe where a green box labeled '1955' and a black, red, and gold horizontal flag appear in the upper left corner.
[10-12] A static map of Europe displays color-coded political alliances. Western nations appear dark blue, Eastern bloc countries are pink, and the Soviet Union is red, while neutral states like Spain and Sweden are grey. The '1955' label and German flag remain fixed in the corner.

[16-22] A static wide shot depicts a formal gathering where a central elderly man with white hair and a mustache sits at a dark red table, writing on a document with a black pen. Behind him, four men in suits stand in a row facing forward: a man with grey hair and a mustache in a dark grey suit on the left, a man with dark hair in a black suit, a balding man in a grey suit, and a bald man in a dark suit on the right. Blurred figures populate the distant background. [22-26] The camera cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a yellow pencil, completing a signature on a white document characterized by grey horizontal lines representing text, set against a solid dark red background. The signature appears as a grey scribble on the paper.

[26-28] A close-up persists showing a hand holding a yellow pencil over a white document with grey horizontal lines and a scribbled signature against a solid dark red background. [28-30] The scene shifts to an animated standoff superimposed over a European map. Soldiers in green helmets and olive drab uniforms on the left aim rifles toward soldiers in brown coats and a fur ushanka with a red star on the right. [30-34] New soldiers appear on the right foreground wearing grey-green uniforms and helmets with white emblems, holding black assault rifles aimed left. The opposing forces remain in a static standoff over the color-coded map background.

recent_thinks: [12-14] The static map of Europe remains unchanged, displaying color-coded political alliances. Dark blue covers Western nations, pink indicates Eastern bloc countries, red marks the Soviet Union, and grey denotes neutral states. The green "1955" label and the black, red, and gold horizontal flag stay fixed in the upper left corner throughout this duration.

[14-16] The map view transitions to an animated scene showing a group of men in suits. One man with white hair and a mustache sits at a red table, writing on a paper. Four other men in dark suits stand behind him in a row. Blurred figures are visible in the background behind the standing men.

[34-36] The scene remains unchanged, displaying a static standoff between two groups of soldiers over a map of Europe. Soldiers on the left in olive drab and green helmets face right, while soldiers on the right in grey-green uniforms and brown coats face left, all holding rifles aimed at the opposing side without any movement.

[36-38] The view cuts back to the men in suits at the red table. A graphical overlay appears at the bottom, featuring a row of national flags on the left, beginning with a red flag with a yellow emblem, and a small political map of Europe on the right displaying blue and red regions.

[38-40] The central man continues writing at the red table while four men stand behind him. The bottom overlay fully displays a large Soviet flag next to seven smaller Eastern Bloc flags. A map on the right illustrates the European divide with blue and red territories.

queries.question: Tell me when the cartoon soldiers scene starts.

samples.output: <think>The scene remains static with the central elderly man writing at the red table while four men stand behind him. The bottom overlay persists, displaying a large red flag with a yellow emblem, seven smaller national flags, and a political map of Europe showing blue and red territories on the right.</think><action>silent</action>
